title: HBAD-254 Mio Morisaki, a schoolgirl who gets molested every day and whose body is trained to be too sensitive to the molester's techniques
overview: I have a problem. Every day on my way to school, a stranger molests me and touches my body persistently. I'm timid and I couldn't say anything and just put up with it. One day, a molester came into my house and raped me. That day marked the beginning of a change in something inside me. I continued to seek shame at the molester's command.
